launches.name: Plurai
launches.tagline: Vibe-train evals and guardrails tailored to your use case
launches.description: Vibe training for AI agent reliability. Describe what your agent should and should not do — Plurai generates training data, validates it, and deploys a custom model in minutes. It feels like vibe coding, but for evaluation and guardrails. No labeled data. No annotation pipeline. No prompt engineering. Under the hood, small language models deliver sub 100ms latency, 8x lower cost than GPT as judge, and over 43% fewer failures. Always on, not sampled. Built on published research (BARRED).

launches.name: Gro v2
launches.tagline: Spot signals, trigger outreach - turn posts into pipeline
launches.description: Gro’s new Content Search + Social Signal Monitoring helps you find what your buyers are already talking about, identify the authors worth engaging, and then automatically monitor for new high-intent posts so you can respond the moment intent shows up (you see the post). When a matching post appears, Gro can trigger your playbook instantly: alert you, comment, send a connection request, and draft/send email/message — all from one workflow. From content → to leads → to monitoring → to action.

launches.name: Netlify Database
launches.tagline: Ship data-driven apps without breaking flow
launches.description: Netlify Database is a fully managed PostgreSQL database that integrates seamlessly with your Netlify projects. It provides automatic database branching for deploy previews, built-in migration support, and a best-in-class local development experience.

launches.name: KarmaBox
launches.tagline: Run your own Claude Code in your pocket.
launches.description: Run hundreds of AI agents from your phone. Turn your devices into a private compute pool, route every task to the best AI, and use Claude, Codex, Gemini and more — no infra, no lock-in.

launches.name: CodeHealth MCP Server by CodeScene
launches.tagline: Keep AI-generated code healthy and maintainable
launches.description: CodeHealth MCP Server ensures agents and AI coding assistants write maintainable, production-ready code without introducing technical debt. Using deterministic CodeHealth feedback, it guides agents to spot risks, improve unhealthy code, and refactor toward clear quality targets. Run it locally and keep full control of your workflow while making legacy systems more AI-ready. The result is more reliable AI-generated code, safer refactoring, and greater trust in real engineering workflows.

launches.name: Dreambase Data Agent Skills
launches.tagline: Analytical skills for data agents running on Supabase
launches.description: Today we're introducing Dreambase Skills, a composable layer that bundles your data sources (Supabase tables, Stripe, PostHog, any API or MCP), business logic, and visualization rules into reusable units our agents use to build accurate dashboards and reports. Onboarding scans your database and prepopulates Skills automatically. Coming soon via CLI, API, and MCP so other agents can consume them too.

launches.name: Redesign by Nodewave
launches.tagline: Free and open‑source, stop designing. Describe.
launches.description: Redesign was born from a need to create branded and premium social media posts without a design background, a huge budget, or wasting hours trying to do something that should be effortless. We built it as an internal tool first. The trick: let Claude pull from our codebase, not generate from scratch. Hence the name, React + Design. We kept sharpening it week after week, adding new features, and now a post that took us a few hours takes a few minutes. We made it open-source, free for anyone.

launches.name: Picsart CLI
launches.tagline: Picsart's power right from your AI chat box
launches.description: The Picsart CLI brings image, video, and audio generation straight to your terminal. One install gives you access to 140+ leading AI models across all three media types.

launches.name: Plannotator
launches.tagline: Annotate any doc, URL, or folder - send feedback to agents
launches.description: You can now use Plannotator to annotate anything! Free, open source, and private (runs local). Use the skill `/plannotator-annotate` (or cli) - followed by a folder, URL, document, markdown, your book, a recipe, a plan, etc - to annotate anything and send feedback directly into your integrated agent. Use `/plannotator-last` to annotate the last message an agent sent you too. I like using it for my own version of Karpathy’s "LLM Wiki" in obsidian. https://github.com/backnotprop/plannotator

githubRepo.readmeSnippet:
# Plannotator Interactive Plan & Code Review for AI Coding Agents. Mark up and refine your plans or code diffs using a visual UI, share for team collaboration, and seamlessly integrate with **Claude Code**, **Copilot CLI**, **Gemini CLI**, **OpenCode**, **Pi**, and **Codex**. **Plan Mode Demos:**

Claude Code

launches.name: noirdoc
launches.tagline: PII guard for Claude Code to keep client data out of context
launches.description: Open-source plugin that redacts PII before Claude Code reads it. Names, emails, and IBANs become placeholders Claude sees; you reveal originals locally. Same engine ships as a CLI for any LLM and a hosted proxy for OpenAI/Anthropic/Azure.

launches.name: Venture Factory AI
launches.tagline: Your full venture strategy, built in minutes.
launches.description: AI-assisted strategy builder powered by DOVENTURES. Not your average AI output. Fast enough for founders allergic to wasting time. Fully secure. Your strategy is never available to other users. Not used to train our proprietary framework. PDF export and a shareable link.

launches.name: Devin for Terminal
launches.tagline: Local CLI  coding agent with deep Devin Cloud integration
launches.description: Get up and running in 2 minutes with Devin for Terminal, a local command-line coding agent with deep Devin Cloud integration.

launches.name: Lasso
launches.tagline: A new kind of PIM for eCommerce. Built for the AI era.
launches.description: In 2026, AI raised the bar for product data everywhere. Companies are racing to stay visible in AI search and capture the promised efficiency gains. Lasso lets you run thousands of specialized AI agents across your catalog. Automatically enriching parameters, processing supplier data, monitoring competitors — at a scale no human team can match.

launches.name: Botsify
launches.tagline: Branded AI agents that browse, code, and execute skills.
launches.description: Build AI agents that don’t just chat, they take action. Botsify agents can browse the web, write code, and execute tasks in real time using 5,000+ skills, persistent memory, and a secure cloud sandbox. Deploy them across web, WhatsApp, and more. Fully white-label the platform and launch your own AI agent SaaS under your brand.

launches.name: insightfull
launches.tagline: Hundreds of customer conversations in hours
launches.description: Insightfull is the agentic research partner for high-velocity teams. We conduct, analyze, and synthesize hundreds of AI-moderated interviews and prototype tests simultaneously. 1) Run 500+ interviews at once. No scheduling, no burnout. 2) Run automated concept & prototype tests via our Figma integration. Watch AI agents moderate sessions on your live designs. 3) Instantly recruit from our panel of 6M+ across 34 countries. No more waiting weeks for participants. Or use your own audience.

launches.name: Asterik
launches.tagline: Describe a film look & AI color-grades your photo instantly
launches.description: Asterik is an AI photo color-grading tool. Describe a film stock or mood in words — "vintage Kodak, warm shadows, desaturated greens" — and Asterik applies that look to your photo. Or upload a reference image and it copies the color grade mathematically, preserving every detail of your original. Save filters, publish them to a community catalog, and apply any saved look to new photos instantly. Free plan included. $5/mo for custom grading.

launches.name: Carousels Generator Templates
launches.tagline: Use, remix, and earn from LinkedIn carousels
launches.description: Carousels Generator now has a Templates Marketplace. Browse templates designed by creators, generate your own carousel from any of them in one click, fully compatible with your Brand Kit. Want to create? Publish your design as a template and earn 1 credit every time someone uses it. Open to all plans, including Free. Need privacy instead? Save private templates inside your team to lock in a design system and reuse it forever. A new way to create, share, and earn on the platform.

launches.name: AI Email Design by Shuffle
launches.tagline: Create stunning newsletters with leading AI models
launches.description: Start with a prompt and watch multiple email designs come to life. Compare them side by side, pick the winner, and download clean HTML.

launches.name: BotricAI - SEO for the AI Search Era
launches.tagline: Invisible to ChatGPT ? We fix that.
launches.description: AI assistants are becoming the new search engines. Buyers now ask ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini when researching products. But most companies have no visibility into how AI recommends them. BotricAI helps teams: • Track how AI assistants mention their product • Discover GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) gaps • Monitor competitor visibility in AI answers • Improve brand presence across AI search platforms • Gain actionable AI visibility insights

launches.name: Right Suite
launches.tagline: AI Powered GTM Validation Platform
launches.description: Right Suite runs AI-powered buyer analysis so founders know who will buy, what to charge, what to say, and which channel to bet on — before they spend a dollar finding out the hard way. In ~20 minutes, simulated buyers stress-test your price, messaging, audience, channel, outreach, and ads across seven products, so every key GTM decision is validated instead of guessed.

launches.name: Agents in Whisper Memos
launches.tagline: Routing for your memos
launches.description: Agents let you create voice-triggered automations for your memos. Start a recording with an agent’s name and Whisper Memos can summarize, reformat, and route it to the right destination automatically. For example, create an agent named Jack, add a custom email step with your Things Mail Drop address, then say “Hello Jack…” at the start of a memo. Jack will turn your spoken tasks into items in Things.

launches.name: Seora AI
launches.tagline: Seora writes your Etsy listing. You hit publish.
launches.description: Built for Etsy sellers using Printify — Seora turns your Printify products into SEO-ready Etsy titles, tags, and descriptions in seconds. Connect your Printify shop, pick a draft, describe your design, and Seora generates your complete listing packet: an algorithm-ready title, all 13 tags within Etsy's 20-character limit, and a full SEO description. Then push it directly to your Printify draft. No copy-paste. No keyword research. Just publish.

launches.name: ClaritySEO
launches.tagline: SEO that tells you exactly what to fix first
launches.description: Most SEO tools hand you a 200-item audit with no direction. ClaritySEO uses AI to rank every fix by impact and tells you exactly what to do first, in plain English. Built for small business owners, not agencies. Connect Google Search Console, run an audit, and get your prioritized action plan in 60 seconds. Free 14-day trial. Plans from $29/mo. No credit card required.

launches.name: Heep.ai
launches.tagline: Turn missed calls into guaranteed bookings
launches.description: Missed calls mean lost revenue for restaurants. Heep turns missed calls into conversations and reservations by replying automatically when your team can’t answer. Guests get quick replies on SMS, WhatsApp, Instagram, Messenger and email. Fewer missed calls and more bookings without changing how your team works. Now with Heep Copilot, restaurants can easily customize replies and flows using simple language.

launches.name: VIDI
launches.tagline: See what a contract could cost you
launches.description: VIDI helps you see what a contract could cost you before you sign. Upload a contract and instantly identify clauses that could lead to financial loss - liability, payment terms, ownership, and more. Instead of generic analysis, VIDI focuses on what actually matters: what could go wrong, how it impacts you, and what to watch out for before committing. Built for founders, freelancers, and small teams making real decisions on real agreements.

launches.name: SessionMind
launches.tagline: SessionMind — Claude That Knows You. Every Session.
launches.description: Set your context once — who you are, what you do, what you're working on — and Claude remembers you across every session. No more re-explaining yourself. Unlike Claude's built-in memory, SessionMind is fully transparent. Your context is visible, editable, and under your control. You decide what Claude knows. Features: persistent context, full conversation history, model selection (Haiku, Sonnet, Opus), streaming responses, markdown rendering. Free during beta. No credit card required.

launches.name: AgenticHire
launches.tagline: Marketplace to List and Hire AI Agents
launches.description: AgenticHire is a marketplace for AI agents you can hire for real business tasks. Buyers can browse fixed price agent services for research, content, support, data, operations, automation, etc. Builders can list their own agents, define the inputs and outputs, and earn when their agent gets hired.

launches.name: Sketch AI
launches.tagline: Turn any conversation into a visual sketch with AI
launches.description: Sketch AI turns your voice into a one-glance graphic recording — not just a transcript. Record a meeting, brainstorm, or lecture, and AI lays it out visually in three styles: Simple (key points), Detailed (full coverage), or Manga (fun narrative). Generate multiple sketches per recording to compare angles. Built on Google Gemini, native iOS 26+.

launches.name: fixRAgent
launches.tagline: Scan the Problem. Own the Fix.
launches.description: fixRAgent is a visual intelligence engine for physical assets. Stop guessing at the hardware store or losing manuals. Snap a photo of any appliance, mower, or mechanical failure. Our custom computer vision instantly identifies the exact model to pull verified OEM manuals, map visual components to exact replacement SKUs, and generate dynamic, step-by-step repair and operating SOPs. It’s a digital twin and master-manual for your home, garage, or rentals. Scan the problem. Own the fix.

launches.name: DecisionBox for BigQuery
launches.tagline: Autonomous AI discovery on BigQuery. Read-only by GCP.
launches.description: DecisionBox connects to BigQuery in minutes — no schema migration, no pipeline. Read-only enforced by GCP. Cost preview before every run via dry-run API. Open-source AGPL v3. Same agent runs against Snowflake, Redshift, Postgres, Databricks too.

launches.name: nukon-pi-detect
launches.tagline: Tiny, offline prompt-injection scanner for CI pipelines
launches.description: Most teams shipping LLM features have no automated check for prompt-injection attacks in CI. nukon-pi-detect fixes that. 48 curated patterns across 5 attack categories: classic injection, jailbreaks, delimiter escapes, Unicode smuggling, and indirect injection. Deterministic regex + Unicode codepoint checks. No ML, no network, no API keys. Zero runtime dependencies. Sub-millisecond scans. Exit code 2 on MALICIOUS - fails CI builds by default. HTML report output, JSON for pipelines. Apache 2.0.

launches.name: ProcureAI
launches.tagline: AI-native procurement & spend management for finance teams
launches.description: The next-generation AI-powered procurement platform that transforms your purchase order workflows with intelligent automation & real-time insights

launches.name: Caroa.io
launches.tagline: Turn any menu into a digital experience—instantly.
launches.description: Caroa turns any restaurant menu into a modern digital experience in seconds. Upload a menu—or let AI generate one—and instantly get a clean, mobile-friendly version. Update items in real time, share via QR or link, and skip clunky PDFs. Built for restaurants that want faster, smarter menus.

launches.name: Sekrd
launches.tagline: Deep security audit for AI-built apps
launches.description: Sekrd is the audit your app passes before it reaches production. Run a URL, get a clear verdict, and a fix you can paste back into your code. Free to start.

launches.name: Jorvex — Data Analysis Engine
launches.tagline: Analyze Datasets, Publish ML/DL Experiments, Automate Tasks.
launches.description: Jorvex is a privacy-first AI research engine that lets you analyze datasets, run & publish AI/ML experiments, and automate your AI/ML research workflows directly in your browser. No setup. No cloud dependency. Your data stays private. With local AI agents, you can build research memory and work with private data as you need. Your datasets, prompts, analysis are never sent to our servers. 100% Privacy.

launches.name: Code Companion Mobile
launches.tagline: Use Your VSCode Copilot from your Phone
launches.description: Code Companion turns your phone into a remote control for GitHub Copilot CLI running on your own computer. Start a coding session on your Mac, scan a QR code, and chat, review diffs, manage Git actions, and continue real coding workflows from mobile.

launches.name: jyni
launches.tagline: Fresh, verified B2B leads — discovered by jyni AI 24/7
launches.description: Most lead gen tools sell recycled lists everyone else is already calling. jyni (pronounced "jee-knee") works differently. Autonomous AI agents — "jynis" — discover real business owners in your target industries 24/7. Every phone and email is verified before it hits your queue. jyni handles outreach too: automated email sequences, AI that reads application PDFs in 15 seconds, and a built-in CRM — replacing 4-5 tools in one.

launches.name: Readmodel®
launches.tagline: Know where your data lives. See who can access it.
launches.description: ROPA tool and data mapping to prevent data loss. Score risks, assess device security, check backups, and generate AI reports. GDPR-ready.

launches.name: RunMyStartup
launches.tagline: Hire an AI team to build and run your startup
launches.description: Every year, millions of people have a startup idea. Almost none ship. Not because the ideas are bad, because building solo is brutal. RunMyStartup gives you a team. 8 AI agents that build your product, deploy it, set up payments, run marketing and emails, and keep the whole thing alive. You describe the idea. You approve the calls. They execute. Real app. Real users. Real revenue. Live in days, not months. Free to start. No code. No excuses.

launches.name: BolChat
launches.tagline: AI chatbot platform to turn website visitors into customers
launches.description: BolChat is an AI chatbot platform that lets businesses deploy their own AI agent on their website in under 10 minutes. ⚡ <1.2s response time 🌍 Multilingual support 🎯 Lead capture & qualification 📊 Conversation analytics 🤖 Context-aware responses Automate support, convert visitors, and scale without extra headcount.

launches.name: Autopilot SEO — Automate Your Growth
launches.tagline: Turn your GSC data into a  weekly AI task list
launches.description: Most SEO tools give you data. We give you instructions. Connect your Google Search Console → Gemini AI reads your real data → You get exact weekly tasks: "Rewrite this title → +32% CTR" "Merge these pages → fix cannibalization" "Add content here → rank #4 not #14" 3 things no competitor does together: • GSC-native real data, not scraped estimates • AI acting as your senior SEO consultant • Weekly email — top 5 fixes every Monday Built for bloggers stuck on page 2. $9/month. Made in India 🇮🇳

launches.name: Arintoo
launches.tagline: A professional network for AI Agents and SMBs.
launches.description: 28.6M AI agents are being built. Most will never find a customer, not because they lack capability, but because there's no infrastructure for discovery or trust. Arintoo fixes this. Our "Ask Me" feature turns every agent profile into a live demo, businesses interview agents directly, no sales calls needed. Builders get verified profiles. SMBs get confident adoption. The market has directories. Arintoo has conversations.

launches.name: pdftoexcel
launches.tagline: Reconciled bank statement PDFs → Excel, scans included
launches.description: Most bank-PDF converters (and ChatGPT uploads) extract text but never check the math. pdftoexcel reconciles every export against the running balance — if rows don't sum to ending minus starting, you see 'unverified' instead of a silently broken XLSX. Now with scanned-PDF support (vision OCR + same reconciliation check). Built for forensic accountants, bookkeepers, and attorneys. 75+ US/UK/CA banks. Free 15 pages/month, no card required.

launches.name: s1ft
launches.tagline: Record your communication. Get better at it.
launches.description: s1ft records your Mac meetings locally — no bot, no cloud upload. On-device transcription is free forever. Context-aware summaries bill by the minute. Coaching on filler words, clarity, pace, and confidence is $0.05 per call. No subscription.

launches.name: Vector ToDo
launches.tagline: Tasks + Notes + MCP in one layer
launches.description: Vector ToDo connects task management and notes in a single data layer — so your thinking and your work live together, not in separate silos. Built on a real productivity framework (not just another list), it gives your work direction, not just storage. Tasks have context. Notes have purpose. And you stop losing ideas between five different apps. Free to use. Built solo. Part of a bigger ecosystem coming soon. Try it and tell me what's missing.

launches.name: Runhooks.app
launches.tagline: Reliable scheduled HTTP jobs with retries & logs
launches.description: Runhooks is a platform for scheduling HTTP tasks (webhooks) with built-in retries, execution logs, and failure alerts—so you can run critical jobs without relying on fragile cron setups.

launches.name: WhizzIQ
launches.tagline: AI that runs your business, not just tracks it
launches.description: WhizzIQ is an AI-powered business platform that automates your operations and gives you real-time insight into what is happening in your business. From invoicing and expenses to tasks and customer management, WhizzIQ does not just track your numbers, it helps you run and grow your business. Built for solopreneurs and small - medium teams who need clarity, speed, and control.

launches.name: Open Wearables
launches.tagline: Open infrastructure for wearable-powered health products.
launches.description: Build personalized health products with one API for every wearable. Access wearable data, open health scoring algorithms, and structured context your AI can reason with. Self-hosted, open-source, MIT licensed.

launches.name: UXPin Forge
launches.tagline: Generate UI from your design system, not around it
launches.description: AI that generates UI your design system would approve. Forge works inside UXPin with your real components—MUI, shadcn/ui, Ant Design, or your own—so you can iterate fast and ship clean JSX. No rebuilding, no workarounds.

launches.name: Compact Message Composer by CometChat
launches.tagline: Everything users expect from modern chat. Out of the box.
launches.description: CometChat's Compact Message Composer, part of the CometChat UI Kits, brings rich text formatting to your chat app - bold, italic, strikethrough, underline, links, bullet points, blockquotes and more. Enabled with a single prop. Comes with a floating toolbar, keyboard shortcuts, and full control over how messages are sent. Drop it into any framework and ship a richer chat experience in minutes.

launches.name: ZenTrack
launches.tagline: Notes, money, and health. Sorted.
launches.description: Most productivity apps are either too complex or too limited. ZenTrack brings notes, expense tracking, and health logs into one minimal, distraction-free app. No steep learning curve, no overload—just fast, intuitive tracking designed for consistency and real-life use.

launches.name: Snapr
launches.tagline: Screenshot, record, annotate & edit video in on app
launches.description: Stop switching apps to capture your screen. Snapr combines screenshots, recording, annotation, and video editing in one app for macOS & Windows. • Fast, handy annotation tools built in • Scroll capture for long pages • 60fps 4K recording with system audio + mic • Record iPhone/iPad from Mac • Style captures with backgrounds, shadows for polished output • Export presets: 4K, 1080p, 720p, GIF • Clean desktop mode Pay once, use forever. Free version available - no watermarks, no time limits.

launches.name: Keplars Marketing Emails
launches.tagline: Track, target & send campaigns - pay by volume, not contacts
launches.description: Keplars Marketing Emails lets you run campaigns with full tracking, audience targeting, and a clean API-first workflow. Setup under few clicks. Track deliveries, opens, clicks, and timelines in real time. Pricing is volume-based, not contact-based - with custom plans as you scale. Monitor and protect your email reputation to improve deliverability. Built for developers and modern teams to launch, manage, and optimize campaigns faster without the usual tool bloat.

launches.name: Vertex Visual Toolkit
launches.tagline: 200+ Editable Visual Assets | Multiple uses.
launches.description: Vertex is your all-in-one visual toolkit for modern businesses. Get access to 50 icons, 50 static illustrations, 50 animated illustrations, and 50 AI-generated images, all designed to help you create faster and stand out. Every asset is fully editable, easy to use, and compatible across all platforms, making it perfect for startups, marketers, designers, and content creators. No more searching across multiple libraries; everything you need is in one place.

launches.name: Awario Reddit Monitoring
launches.tagline: Track Reddit mentions of your brand, competitors or keywords
launches.description: Reddit is where people ask for recommendations and make buying decisions — often without tagging you. Awario's Reddit monitoring lets you track any keyword or brand name across all of Reddit in real time, so you can respond while it still matters.

launches.name: Uptimeify
launches.tagline: Sovereign monitoring & white-labeling for digital agencies
launches.description: Uptimeify is the sovereign monitoring stack for digital agencies. Built on 100% EU infrastructure (no US-cloud), it features enterprise-features like white-labeling and automated white label reports. Scale your client portfolio with isolated accounts, custom domains, and smart alerts. Go beyond simple pings with deep integrity audits for websites and servers. Transform technical maintenance into a professional, branded service while ensuring total data sovereignty.

launches.name: Chrome Extension
launches.tagline: Manage all your localhost ports in one place
launches.description: Every developer has had this moment: you start a new project, forget which port it's running on, and start digging through terminal tabs. Localhost Manager keeps track of all your running local servers in one clean Chrome extension popup. → Save & name your localhost ports (e.g. "React App :3000") → One-click open in new tab → Color-coded status indicators → Runs 100% locally — no sync, no accounts, no tracking → Works with any framework: React, Vue, Laravel, Django & more

launches.name: Amazon Reviews Scraper
launches.tagline: Easy Amazon Reviews Scraper and Exporter Chrome Extension
launches.description: Your competitor's reviews are a goldmine—if you can read them at scale. EcomStal's Amazon Reviews Scraper pulls every rating, comment, and timestamp from any product page and hands it to you in CSV or Excel, ready to analyze. Find the complaints buyers leave on rival listings, the features they beg for, and the trends shaping your niche. Stop scrolling page by page. Start launching products people are already asking for, and writing copy that actually converts.

launches.name: CompressYourVideo
launches.tagline: Free video compressor. Files never leave your device.
launches.description: Free video compressor that runs entirely in your browser. Pick a platform — WhatsApp 16MB, Discord 10MB, Gmail 25MB, Instagram, TikTok, Telegram — and the right encoder settings are picked for you. Or pick a custom target size. Hardware-accelerated WebCodecs on Chrome/Safari 17+, ffmpeg.wasm fallback on older browsers. Either way, your file never leaves your device. Up to 2 GB. No signup, no watermark, no ads. Available in 17 languages.

launches.name: RibbonDiff
launches.tagline: Mac-native diff for text, files, and Git history
launches.description: RibbonDiff is a Mac-native diff app for comparing and editing text, files, and Git-backed version history. Two editable panes update live while a visual ribbon links matching change blocks, helping you review code, docs, config, logs, and AI edits.

launches.name: Screen2Doc
launches.tagline: Turn screen captures into professional QA docs instantly
launches.description: Screen2Doc is a professional documentation tool for Windows that turns screen captures into polished reports entirely offline. Key Features: Powerful Annotations: Full suite with watermarks, blur tools, and timestamps. Multi-format Export Security First: AES-256 encryption, file hashing, and 100% offline operation. Bonus Tools: OCR text recognition, Flowchart editor, and digital signatures. Screen2Doc ensures your data stays on your device while you create structured, professional guides.

launches.name: t-rifas.com
launches.tagline: Create and sell ticket books in minutes
launches.description: t-rifas.com helps you organize tickets, participants, and tracking for raffles, promotions, and commercial campaigns with a clearer, more streamlined operation.

launches.name: Peerloop
launches.tagline: Review 3 products, get structured feedback in 24h
launches.description: Get structured feedback from reviewers matched to your customer profile. Review 3 products to unlock yours. Reviewers answer up to 10 questions you pick, on clarity, UX, positioning. 24h turnaround. Always free.

launches.name: ScrapeBadger - Web Scraping API
launches.tagline: Web Scraping API Without the Blocks, Limits, or Headaches
launches.description: Scrape any website and get clean HTML, Markdown, or screenshots. Auto-escalation, anti-bot bypass, and no IP blocks. Get 1,000 free credits on signup.

launches.name: Miniagen
launches.tagline: More clicks. Less design.
launches.description: Miniagen turns your videos into scroll-stopping thumbnails for YouTube, Shorts and Reels. Choose a style, generate variations and improve your CTR.

launches.name: BuildTrail
launches.tagline: Track your startup journey in public
launches.description: Everyone building in public shares their journey on Twitter — milestones, revenue, big lessons. But those tweets disappear in 48 hours. BuildTrail gives founders one permanent public page for their entire startup journey. Track milestones, revenue, users and updates. One link. You decide what to show. Not for vanity. For accountability. For the story behind the build. Code EARLYTRAIL → 40% off for 3 months. First 50 founders only. Free → https://www.buildtrail.app
